creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: cs
Date: Sun Jul 14 20:38:13 2013
New Revision: 323001
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/323001

Log:
  Update to 0.2.2
  
  PR:		ports/179893 ports/179928

Added:
  head/security/pyobfsproxy/files/
  head/security/pyobfsproxy/files/patch-setup.py   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/security/pyobfsproxy/Makefile
  head/security/pyobfsproxy/distinfo
  head/security/pyobfsproxy/pkg-descr
  head/security/pyobfsproxy/pkg-plist

Modified: head/security/pyobfsproxy/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/security/pyobfsproxy/Makefile	Sun Jul 14 20:11:46 2013	(r323000)
+++ head/security/pyobfsproxy/Makefile	Sun Jul 14 20:38:13 2013	(r323001)
@@ -3,19 +3,30 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	pyobfsproxy
-DISTVERSION=	0.0.2
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	0.2.2
 CATEGORIES=	security net python
-MASTER_SITES=	http://www.c-s.li/ports/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://www.c-s.li/ports/ \
+		http://schema.filez.com/distfiles/
+DISTNAME=	obfsproxy-${PORTVERSION}-${GIT_COMMIT}
 
 MAINTAINER=	cs@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Pluggable transport proxy
 
-RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}pyptlib>=0:${PORTSDIR}/security/py-pyptlib
-
 LICENSE=	BSD
 
+RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}pyptlib>=0:${PORTSDIR}/security/py-pyptlib \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}argparse>0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-argparse \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}pycrypto>=2.1:${PORTSDIR}/security/py-pycrypto
+
+GIT_COMMIT=	ba6098
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_TWISTED=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
+PYDISTUTILS_PKGNAME=obfsproxy
+
+post-extract:
+	${MV} ${WRKDIR}/${DISTNAME} ${WRKDIR}/obfsproxy-${PORTVERSION}
+
+WRKSRC=${WRKDIR}/obfsproxy-${PORTVERSION}
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/security/pyobfsproxy/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/security/pyobfsproxy/distinfo	Sun Jul 14 20:11:46 2013	(r323000)
+++ head/security/pyobfsproxy/distinfo	Sun Jul 14 20:38:13 2013	(r323001)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (pyobfsproxy-0.0.2.tar.gz) = 56c237cb70bc457f547eca1aea36e8926e6551eca85a514dd0a6eac2f6a7772f
-SIZE (pyobfsproxy-0.0.2.tar.gz) = 47100
+SHA256 (obfsproxy-0.2.2-ba6098.tar.gz) = 6d529fd983efd8e2f41a5ca491622a2e2c0c0a805361917f7ccc65dd3a19d8c6
+SIZE (obfsproxy-0.2.2-ba6098.tar.gz) = 61711

Added: head/security/pyobfsproxy/files/patch-setup.py
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/security/pyobfsproxy/files/patch-setup.py	Sun Jul 14 20:38:13 2013	(r323001)
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+--- setup.py.orig	2013-07-14 19:01:36.000000000 +0000
++++ setup.py	2013-07-14 19:02:02.000000000 +0000
+@@ -31,7 +31,7 @@
+     install_requires = [
+         'setuptools',
+         'PyCrypto',
+-        'Twisted',
++        'Twisted_Core',
+         'argparse',
+         'pyptlib'
+         ],

Modified: head/security/pyobfsproxy/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/security/pyobfsproxy/pkg-descr	Sun Jul 14 20:11:46 2013	(r323000)
+++ head/security/pyobfsproxy/pkg-descr	Sun Jul 14 20:38:13 2013	(r323001)
@@ -1,4 +1,3 @@
-Pyobfsproxy is a pluggable transport proxy written in Python. Its architecture
-is similar to the architecture of Obfsproxy.
+Obfsproxy is a pluggable transport proxy written in Python.
 
-WWW: https://gitweb.torproject.org/pluggable-transports/pyobfsproxy.git
+WWW: https://gitweb.torproject.org/pluggable-transports/obfsproxy.git
